company: Florida investor-owned electric utilities (FPL, Progress Energy Florida, Tampa Electric, Gulf Power)
doc_type: final order on fuel cost recovery
source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-12-0664-FOF-EI (Final Order), Docket No. 120001-EI, 'Fuel and purchased power cost recovery clause with generating performance incentive factor', issued December 21, 2012 (39 pp) — the Commission's annual review setting fuel/capacity cost-recovery factors and generating-performance incentive rewards/penalties for Florida's investor-owned electric utilities. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Florida PSC document clerk, document 08286-2012 (psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2012/08286-2012.pdf).

company: Florida Power & Light Company and Duke Energy Florida (nuclear cost recovery)

source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-14-0617-FOF-EI (Final Order Approving...), Docket No. 140009-EI, 'Nuclear cost recovery clause', issued October 27, 2014 (49 pp) — the Commission's annual prudence review and true-up of nuclear power-plant project costs recovered by Florida utilities under Section 366.93, Fla. Stat. and Rule 25-6.0423, F.A.C. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Florida PSC document clerk, document 06043-2014 (psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2014/06043-2014.pdf).

company: Florida investor-owned electric utilities (storm protection plan cost recovery)

source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-2023-0364-FOF-EI (Final Order), Docket No. 20230010-EI, 'Storm protection plan cost recovery clause', issued November 29, 2023 (26 pp) — the Commission's annual review of the reasonableness of storm-protection-plan costs and the resulting cost-recovery factors for Florida's investor-owned electric utilities.
